text.title: Production Trace Mining Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: 5000-trace sample → validated trace-mining-spec.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Task: produce fine-tune candidate dataset for support-bot intents from Q2 2026.
Step 1. Scrub spec `eval-set-support-bot-2026q2.json` confirmed committed, last_reviewed 2026-05-22. Scrubbed traces at `warehouse://prod.support_2026q2_scrubbed`.

Step 2. Capability frequency: `intent_classification` (2340), `tool_call_routing` (1480), `clarification_q` (730), `out_of_scope_handoff` (210). The `out_of_scope_handoff` capability dropped (<50 needed for stat power on next iter).
Step 3. Volume mixed (2340 vs 730), so mode = `heuristic_plus_judge`. Rules ref: `git://faion/labels/support.yaml@a1b2c3d`.
Step 4. Trigger: `schedule: monthly: 1st`. Retention: 365 days (matches legal).
Result. Spec committed; fine-tune job in next cadence consumes it without re-deriving rationale; review-by date 2026-08-22.
